Book Eye Test

Contact Lenses

Effortless vision, expertly fitted.

From daily disposables to specialised toric lenses, our certified contact lens specialists ensure a comfortable, hygienic and crystal-clear fit.

Book a fitting

Lens types

The right lens, for the right life.

Daily disposables

Fresh pair every day. Hygienic, low-maintenance and perfect for occasional wearers.

Monthly lenses

Premium silicone-hydrogel monthlies for everyday comfort. Most economical for regular wearers.

Toric (for astigmatism)

Specially designed lenses that correct astigmatism. Custom-fitted for stable, sharp vision.

Coloured & cosmetic

FDA-approved coloured lenses from premium brands. Subtle to bold, with prescription or plano.

The fitting process

A 90-minute consultation.

A proper contact lens fitting is more than a prescription. We measure corneal curvature, evaluate tear film, trial a lens, and only finalise once you feel completely comfortable.

  1. 01

    Corneal measurement

    Topography mapping for the perfect base curve.

  2. 02

    Tear film evaluation

    Ensuring your eyes stay hydrated through long wear.

  3. 03

    Trial fitting

    Wear a trial pair to test comfort and movement.

  4. 04

    Vision check & adjustment

    Fine-tune power and design until vision is perfect.

  5. 05

    Care & hygiene training

    Step-by-step training on insertion, removal and storage.

Begin the journey

Book your eye test
today.

Walk into our Hadapsar boutique for a complimentary consultation. We'll measure, advise and craft the perfect pair — together.
